Claude Commander

Projects & sessions
connecting…
Select a session
Pick a session on the left to view its terminal, or create a new one with ＋. Keystrokes you type here are sent live to that session.

Session info

New session

Add project

Register a single git repo by its path, or scan a directory for repos.

Settings

⚠ A restart is required for some changes to take effect.
Web UI

Paths to PEM files on the machine running claude-commander. Clients must present a certificate signed by the client CA.
